blog_post_charm.name: Blog Post - Glasses Charm
blog_post_charm.description: Posted at 9:27 PM on the day of the incident. Contains an image of a pair of glasses with two glasses charms attached.

loud_sound.name: Loud Sound
loud_sound.description: A loud sound heard by Maggey while she was in the shower at around 9:30 PM on the day of the incident.

Detention_Center_Start.text: {stopBGM:false}{hideCharacter}{bg:DetentionCenter}{fg:Detention_Bars}{center}{color:lime}{blip:3}September 17, unspecified time{nl}{p:500}Detention Center{color:white}
{sprite:Maggey["Sad"]}{hideCharacter}{hideTextbox}{fadeInCharacter}{startBGM:detentionCenter}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {showTextbox}{blip:1}Maggey.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Sad"]}{blip:2}...Actually, I've been remembering more and more since then.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Sad"]}{blip:2}I might have been the one who pushed Ms. Nakaki, Mr. Wright.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:1}{playSound:shake}{shake:500}What?! What do you mean?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: Start from the beginning and walk me through it.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Normal"]}{blip:2}Right.{sprite:Maggey["Saluting"]}{sprite:Maggey["Normal"]} That day, when I went up, Ms. Nakaki was on the 4th floor practicing the Steel Samurai Show.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: She was the kind of person who would always practice the Steel Samurai Show after closing time...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Determined"]}Honestly, as a guard, she was a real handful. We argued about it so many times.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Sad"]}But I didn't actually dislike someone like her. If this weren't my job, I never would've said anything.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:1}So did you argue with her that day too?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Determined"]}{blip:2}Just a little. But it happened all the time, so I was kind of used to giving up on it...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: I had to write the security log, so I pushed through and wrote it. Updating the blog took about 30 minutes.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:1}Blog?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:2}Yeah.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: If you search for "Unhappy Fallen Angel Blog - Glasses Charm," it should come up.
{bg:BlogPost}{fg:none}{hideCharacter}{hideTextbox}{skip:1000}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {showTextbox}{blip:0}{color:lightblue}(What a creepy blog title... Oh, so this is the one.){color:white}
{addEvidence:blog_post_charm,true}{playSound:evidenceUnlock}{color:lightblue}"Blog Post - Glasses Charm" added to the Court Record.{color:white}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {bg:DetentionCenter}{fg:Detention_Bars}{sprite:Maggey["Saluting"]}{sprite:Maggey["Normal"]}{blip:2}I excitedly uploaded the blog post about my favorite glasses charm, but then I remembered Mr. Sahwit had called for me, so I rushed to take a shower.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:1}What?!

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Sad"]}{blip:2}After my shower, they were gone for some reason.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:1}Then what about the glasses you're wearing right now?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Determined"]}{blip:2}I had someone bring the spare pair from my place. I have astigmatism, so not having glasses is really rough.
{updateEvidence:blog_post_charm,blog_post_charm,true}{playSound:evidenceUnlock}{color:lightblue}{blip:0}"Blog Post - Glasses Charm" updated in the Court Record.{color:white}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:1}So you were walking around without being able to see well...?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:2}Yeah. I nervously made my way to the railing in the dim light.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: Well, actually I just sort of sensed that someone was leaning against the railing...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: I called out but got no response, so I reached out my hand. And then I felt like I touched something... or maybe I didn't...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {playSound:shake}{shake:500}And then I heard the sound of something falling from below...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:1}I see. Was there anything else that bothered you?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Saluting"]}{sprite:Maggey["Normal"]}{blip:2}Something else that bothered me... Oh, there is something! It was about when I started taking my shower.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {color:lightblue}{blip:0}(If she was just starting her shower, that puts it at around 9:30 PM.){color:white}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:2}I could hear it even through the shower, so the sound must have been pretty loud.{flash}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {color:lightblue}{blip:0}(That's curious. I should ask someone about it.){color:white}
{addEvidence:loud_sound,true}{playSound:evidenceUnlock}{color:lightblue}{blip:0}"Loud Sound" added to the Court Record.{color:white}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Determined"]}{blip:2}Mr. Wright... am I in trouble? Will I end up being found guilty?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:1}It'll be okay. Trust me. I'll expose the truth and get you out of this for sure.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {color:lightblue}{blip:0}(Alright. That should do it here.){color:white}{endGame}
